calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-18-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Katie Capielo for administrator Kevin Mein, who was also present.
Gloria Park, former attorney for administrator Kevin Mein.
Teresa Green for beneficiary Kassina Lacer.
Yen Trac for beneficiary Hyla Lacer.

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Final Distribution.

The Court addressed the dispute regarding apportionment of statutory attorney's fees between current and former counsel for petitioner. Ms. Capielo and Ms. Park presented argument regarding the nature and extent of services rendered and the appropriate allocation of fees. Counsel for the beneficiaries also addressed the Court.

After hearing argument, the Court granted the petition and apportioned statutory attorney's fees. The Court ordered that $4,004.04 be allocated to Ms. Capielo and $102,103.07 be allocated to Ms. Park. The order was signed in open court.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-21-2026 Continued To Mar-18-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Katie Capielo for administrator Kevin Mein, who was also present (via Zoom).
Gloria Park, former attorney for administrator Kevin Mein.
Teresa Green for beneficiary Kassina Lacer (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Final Distribution.

The matter had previously been pre-granted without the need for a hearing; however, counsel requested that the matter be placed back on calendar.

The Court heard discussion regarding issues relating to distribution, including concerns about a beneficiary who has not been located or has been unresponsive. The Court discussed possible procedures for addressing the issue and indicated that further proceedings would be necessary before the matter could be resolved.

The Court continued the matter to March 18, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-21-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Glora Park appeared via zoom for and with Kevin Mein (petitioner).

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated January 17, 2005 is admitted to probate. Kevin G. Mein is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $8,210,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 21, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Ng. Not reported.
